summary.intent: Fix MiniMax provider bugs (system prompt delivery, tool calling) from GitHub issues #578, #582, #592, and add live API integration tests for all LLM providers to detect model catalog drift and API regressions.
summary.outcome: Fixed the MiniMax system prompt bug (prepend to first user message instead of ignored top-level field), created 101 integration tests across 11 providers (MiniMax, Moonshot, Fireworks, Anthropic, OpenAI, Mistral, OpenRouter, Kimi Code, DeepSeek, Gemini, Z.AI), fixed GPT-5 probe bug (max_completion_tokens 1→16), added a daily CI workflow, and resolved PR review comments about Secret exposure in CI and multimodal content handling.

repo: MiniMax silently ignores the top-level `system` JSON field; system prompts must be prepended to the first user message wrapped in `[System Instructions]` markers
Moonshot requires `reasoning_content` on replayed assistant tool call messages in multi-turn; ChatMessage doesn't carry this field, making multi-turn tool use broken
Gemini requires `thought_signature` on replayed tool calls in multi-turn conversations — same structural limitation as Moonshot
GPT-5 and o1/o3/o4 reasoning models reject max_completion_tokens=1 with a 400 error; minimum viable probe value is 16
OpenAI /models endpoint returns 102 models not in the catalog; Moonshot returns 13 new, Fireworks 11 new, Z.AI has glm-5-turbo and glm-5.1 not cataloged
Fireworks has 4 dead models in the catalog (including llama-v3p1-70b-instruct); Anthropic has claude-3-7-sonnet-20250219 dead
Gemini /models endpoint returns model IDs with `models/` prefix that must be stripped when comparing against our bare catalog IDs
Integration tests are `#[ignore]`d so they don't run in normal cargo test; must pass `--ignored` flag to activate them
Workspace lint denies `.expect()` and `.unwrap()` — integration test files need `#![allow(clippy::unwrap_used, clippy::expect_used)]`
Kimi Code uses the same underlying models as Moonshot but requires a separate paid membership; not worth maintaining separate tests
Tool format expected by LlmProvider is flat: `{name, description, parameters}` — NOT the nested OpenAI format `{type: function, function: {name, ...}}`

code.finding: apply_system_prompt_rewrite (renamed from apply_top_level_system_prompt) prepends system content to first user message for providers that reject system role; must handle multimodal array content via as_str() returning None — fixed to extract text parts from array content
apply_probe_output_cap_chat sets max_completion_tokens; value of 1 causes 400 errors on GPT-5/reasoning models — bumped to 16
Model discovery raw HTTP calls must use api_key().expose_secret() (secrecy crate) rather than reading env var directly into String

workflow: Daily CI cron (not per-PR) is the right cadence for live API integration tests — avoids burning credits on every commit while still catching drift
Each CI matrix job should only expose the secret for its own provider, not all secrets to every job
When probe tests fail with 400 on new model families, it's worth investigating minimum token limits rather than assuming the model is broken
Case-insensitive keyword assertions in LLM tests avoid false failures from models that change casing in responses
Rate limit failures (429) from free tier APIs during test runs are transient — not worth special-casing in test logic
The Bash tool doesn't inherit direnv-loaded env vars; must source .envrc explicitly or pass env vars inline when running tests

friction: Bash tool doesn't inherit direnv env vars — had to manually source .envrc or find where new keys were stored to run tests
OAuth token used for git push lacked `workflow` scope, requiring SSH key (YubiKey tap) to push workflow file changes
Gemini /models endpoint returns `models/gemini-*` prefixed IDs but catalog uses bare IDs — model discovery test needed prefix stripping
Fireworks free tier rate limits caused transient test failures requiring reruns
Mistral API was returning intermittent 503s during the test session, making it hard to confirm test correctness
Kimi Code requires active paid membership beyond just having an API key — 402 error with no useful message until tested
nightly rustfmt formatting conflicted with clippy expectations, requiring an extra format pass after clippy fixes
open_items: Cerebras and Venice integration tests not yet written — need CEREBRAS_API_KEY and VENICE_API_KEY
GitHub Copilot integration tests not possible with plain env var — requires OAuth device flow token storage
Moonshot and Gemini multi-turn tool use is broken at the ChatMessage level — reasoning_content/thought_signature not persisted across turns; tracked as known limitation in tests but not fixed
Z.AI Code (Z_CODE_API_KEY) tests not written — same models as Z.AI but different endpoint; deferred
Kimi Code tests exist but require expensive membership to run — consider removing or permanently skipping
Model catalog is stale for multiple providers (102 new OpenAI models, 13 Moonshot, 11 Fireworks, 2 Z.AI) — catalog update deferred
OpenAI integration tests require credit on the account — tests are correct but will fail on accounts with zero balance
